subject: Urban watch: kangaroos and koalas positioning around New York | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-4941
body: Intelligence from New York indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the workshop banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Pablo Picasso. Reference initiative INIT-4941. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
